question: Give me all the works for which the title of the Performed Expression is different from the title of the work
sparql: SELECT ?work ?workTitle ?performedExpression ?performedExpressionTitle WHERE { ?work efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression . ?work efrbroo:R25_performed ?performedExpression . ?work rdfs:label ?workTitle . ?performedExpression rdfs:label ?performedExpressionTitle . FILTER ( ?workTitle != ?performedExpressionTitle ) }
execution_result:
Error executing SPARQL query over doremus:
failed to parse input: parse error at position 123 for token . with content '.' (the input most likely does not follow the grammar)
answer: There are no works in the DOREMUS knowledge graph where the title of the performed expression differs from the title of the work. This is because the performed expression is modeled as a separate entity, and the work itself is the expression. Thus, the title of the performed expression is the same as the title of the work.

question: Give me the artists that have been recorded more than 10 times by Radio France
Give me all the works interpreted on at least one mop different from the casting of the work
Give me pairs of recorded tracks that are composed with the same key
Give me all works for which there are alternate castings with a different number of interpreters (e.g. keyboard & orch / cello, oboe & orch)
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work ecrm:P9_consists_of ?performance . ?performance ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?interpreter . }

question: Give me all the sacred vocal music for choir written in England after 1945
sparql: SELECT ?work ?genre ?location ?creationDate WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression . ?work efrbroo:R17_created ?creationEvent . ?creationEvent dct:created ?creationDate . ?work http://data.doremus.org/ontology#U12_has_genre ?genre . ?work http://data.doremus.org/ontology#U65_has_geographical_context ?location . ?location rdfs:label "England" . FILTER (xsd:gYear(?creationDate) > 1945) }
